downstream_consumers_of_new_module: none yet -- agents/eval/pipeline.py is a new leaf module; no other module imports it yet. Future real-corpus benchmark-run subtask (e.g. 5.3.x) is the expected caller.

risk_of_reuse.query.synthesizer.synthesize_answer: Read-only reuse; not modified. Its existing behavior (prompt-then-parse-JSON, LLMError propagation, SynthesizerParseError on malformed output) is inherited as-is by all three eval arms. This is intentional: any future change to the production synthesizer automatically and identically affects all three benchmark arms, preserving the fairness guarantee this subtask exists to create.
